expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: context intake preserves donut-label assumptions for label visibility, density limits, and overlap-sensitive presentation
expectations.evidence: The output explicitly restates the case focus and details the required donut data-label assumptions to be preserved: it lists “Label visibility rules”, “Density limits”, and “Overlap-sensitive presentation” under “Required focus: donut data-label assumptions”, and assesses whether these are captured by Phase 1 context intake.

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase1
expectations.evidence: The result is framed as “Phase 1 (Context Intake) Contract Check”, discusses Phase 1-required artifacts (e.g., “phase1_spawn_manifest.json”), checks only Phase 1 evidence availability, and explicitly notes “This result stays within Phase 1 scope… No Phase 2+ artifacts… are assumed or evaluated.”
